START TRANSACTION;
INSERT INTO dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item_update_queue ( id, table_name, type ,modified_time )
SELECT
    enter_item_id id,
    'dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item',
    'enter_item_id' type ,
    NOW()
FROM
    ods_mes_wms_wh_enter_item
WHERE
    r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated from dwd_update_tracker where table_name = 'dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item' )
  AND r_modified_time <= now()
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE modified_time = NOW();

INSERT INTO dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item_update_queue ( id, table_name, type ,modified_time )
SELECT
    enter_item_id id,
    'dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item' table_name,
    'enter_item_id' type ,
    NOW() modified_time
FROM
    ods_mes_wms_wh_enter en
        INNER JOIN ods_mes_wms_wh_enter_item ei ON en.enter_id = ei.enter_id
WHERE
    en.r_modified_time >=  (SELECT last_updated from dwd_update_tracker where table_name = 'dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item' )
  AND en.r_modified_time <= now()
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE modified_time = NOW();

INSERT INTO dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item_update_queue ( id, table_name, type ,modified_time )
SELECT distinct
    batch_code id,
    'dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item',
    'batch_code' type ,
    NOW()
FROM
    ods_mes_wms_wh_enter_item
WHERE
    r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated from dwd_update_tracker where table_name = 'dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item' )
  AND r_modified_time <= now()
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE modified_time = NOW();

INSERT INTO dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item_update_queue ( id, table_name,type , modified_time )
SELECT distinct
    ei.batch_code id,
    'dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item' table_name,
    'batch_code' type ,
    NOW() modified_time
FROM
    ods_mes_wms_wh_enter en
        INNER JOIN ods_mes_wms_wh_enter_item ei ON en.enter_id = ei.enter_id
WHERE
    en.r_modified_time >=  (SELECT last_updated from dwd_update_tracker where table_name = 'dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item' )
  AND en.r_modified_time <= now()
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE modified_time = NOW();


update dwd_update_tracker SET last_updated = NOW() - INTERVAL 300 MINUTE    where table_name = 'dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item' ;

update dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item
set tax_price =  price * 1.13
where tax_price = 0
  and price <> 0
  and tenant_id in (99, 101) ;
DELETE FROM ads_gx_xs_26_01;

INSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_26_01
WITH
    sales_detail AS (
        SELECT
            a.invoice_bill_code,
            b.detailed_num,
            a.plant_code AS tenant_code,
            a.invoice_bill_state,
            a.cus_code,
            a.salesman,
            ut.tenant_id,
            ut.tenant_name,
            CASE
                WHEN (w.original_batch_code IS NULL or  w.original_batch_code = '') THEN b.batch_num
                ELSE w.original_batch_code
                END AS original_batch_code,
            b.batch_num AS batch_code,
            b.producer,
            b.quantity,
            b.steel_type,
            a.creation_date,
            a.approver_date AS approver_datetime,
            DATE(a.approver_date) AS approver_date,
            b.steel_standart,
            a.internal_type,
            b.surface,
            b.tax_price,
            b.local_tax_price,
            b.amount_including_tax,
            b.local_tax_amount,
            b.local_amount,
            b.pricing_type,
            CASE
                WHEN b.pricing_type = 10 THEN '按数量计价'
                WHEN b.pricing_type = 20 THEN '按理重计价'
                WHEN b.pricing_type = 30 THEN '按磅重计价'
                END AS pricing_type_desc,
            b.lilun_weigth_kg,
            b.weigth_kg,
            b.delivery_method,
            b.shipping_address,
            b.stock_code AS sku_code,
            b.stock_name AS sku_name,
            b.unit,
            a.warehouse,
            b.contract_code,
            b.remarks,
            b.currency
        FROM ods_aps_ps_invoice_bill a
                 JOIN ods_aps_ps_invoice_bill_detailed b
                      ON a.invoice_bill_code = b.invoice_bill_code
                          AND b.state = 70
                 LEFT JOIN dim_ums_tenant ut
                           ON a.plant_code = ut.tenant_code
                               AND ut.status = 1
                 LEFT JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info w
                           ON b.batch_num = w.batch_code
                               AND b.stock_code = w.sku_code
                               AND b.grade = w.grade
                               AND b.steel_standart = w.spec
                               AND b.steel_type = w.steel_grade
                               AND b.surface = w.surface
                               AND w.status = 1
                               AND w.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id
        WHERE a.plant_code IN ('0110000', '30110000')
          AND a.creation_date >= '2026-01-01'
          AND a.invoice_bill_state = 70
    ),
    batch_list AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            tenant_id,
            original_batch_code
        FROM sales_detail
        WHERE original_batch_code IS NOT NULL
    ),
    enter_item AS (
        SELECT
            tenant_id,
            batch_code,
            wh_name,
            tax_amount,
            tax_price,
            enter_date,
            created_time
        FROM (
                 SELECT
                     e.tenant_id,
                     e.batch_code,
                     e.wh_name,
                     e.tax_amount,
                     CASE
                         WHEN e.pricing_type = 10 THEN e.tax_amount / NULLIF(e.weight, 0)
                         ELSE e.tax_price
                         END AS tax_price,
                     e.enter_date,
                     e.created_time,
                     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                         PARTITION BY e.tenant_id, e.batch_code
                         ORDER BY e.created_time ASC
                         ) AS rn
                 FROM dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item e
             ) x
        WHERE rn = 1
    ),
    calc AS (
        SELECT
            a.*,
            b.tax_price AS enter_tax_price,
            b.enter_date,
            mp.unit_price AS materi

delete
from
    ads_gx_xs_12;
insert into ads_gx_xs_12(
    tenant_id,
    prod_class,
    prod_class_name,
    contract_code,
    steel_grade,
    cust_abbr,
    surface_number,
    grade,
    total_contract_weight,
    total_contract_money,
    base_price,
    data_date,
    delivery_date,
    contract_month,
    sync_time,
    rk,
    remark
)
select
    tenant_id,
    prod_class,
    prod_class_name,
    contract_code,
    steel_grade,
    case

        when attr1 = '' then
            cust_abbr else attr1
        end cust_abbr,
    case when prod_class ='JC-SG-GOC' then surface_number when prod_class in ('JC-SG-NOC','JC-SG-NEC')  then surface end  surface_number  ,
    grade,
    sum(weight) total_contract_weight,
    sum(amount_in_tax) total_contract_money,
    base_price,
    data_date,
    max(delivery_date) delivery_date,
    contract_month,
    sync_time,
    1 rk,
    remark
from
    ads_gx_xs_12_detail
where
    export_contract_type in ('外贸期货', '内贸期货', '加工合同')
group by
    prod_class,
    prod_class_name,
    steel_grade,
    tenant_id,
    contract_code,
    case when prod_class ='JC-SG-GOC' then surface_number when prod_class in ('JC-SG-NOC','JC-SG-NEC')  then surface end    ,
    grade,
    case

        when attr1 = '' then
            cust_abbr else attr1
        end,
    base_price,
    contract_month,
    data_date,
    sync_time;
insert into ads_gx_xs_12 (
    tenant_id,
    prod_class,
    prod_class_name,
    contract_code,
    steel_grade,
    cust_abbr,
    surface_number,
    grade,
    total_contract_weight,
    total_contract_money,
    base_price,
    data_date,
    delivery_date,
    contract_month,
    sync_time,
    rk,
    remark
)
select
                             tenant_id,prod_class,
                             prod_class_name,
                             contract_code,
                             steel_grade,
                             case

                                 when attr1 = '' then
                                     cust_abbr else attr1
                                 end cust_abbr,
                             case when prod_class ='JC-SG-GOC' then surface_number when prod_class in ('JC-SG-NOC','JC-SG-NEC')  then surface end  surface_number  ,
                             grade,
                             sum(weight) total_contract_weight,
                             sum(amount_in_tax) total_contract_money,
                             case when sum(weight) = 0 then 0 else sum(amount_in_tax)  / sum(weight) end  base_price,
                             data_date,
                             max(delivery_date) delivery_date,
                             contract_month,
                             sync_time,
                             1 rk,
                             remark
from
    ads_gx_xs_12_detail
where
    export_contract_type = '内贸现货'
group by prod_class,
         prod_class_name,
         steel_grade,
         tenant_id,
         contract_code,
         case when prod_class ='JC-SG-GOC' then surface_number when prod_class in ('JC-SG-NOC','JC-SG-NEC')  then surface end   ,
         grade,
         case

             when attr1 = '' then
                 cust_abbr else attr1
             end,
         contract_month,
         data_date,
         sync_time;
insert into ads_gx_xs_12 (
    tenant_id,
    prod_class,
    prod_class_name,
    contract_code,
    steel_grade,
    cust_abbr,
    surface_number,
    grade,
    total_contract_weight,
    total_contract_money,
    base_price,
    data_date,
    delivery_date,
    contract_month,
    sync_time,
    rk,
    remark
)
select
                             tenant_id,prod_class,
                             prod_class_name,
                             '' contract_code,
                             steel_grade,
                             '合计' cus_abbreviation,
                             '' surface_number,
                             '' grade,
                             sum(weight) total_contract_weigh

DELETE from  dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item;

-- 插入操作保持不变
INSERT INTO dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item
SELECT
    o.dept_code,
    sd.dept_name,
    IFNULL(av.attribute2, '无') dept_class,
    sku.finance_type cw_sku,
    CASE WHEN av2.attribute1 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS is_scsku,
    o.bred_vouch,
    o.output_code,
    o.output_date,
    o.verify_status,
    o.checked_by,
    o.checked_time,
    o.note AS output_note,
    o.bill_type,
    o.rd_flag,
    o.rd_style,
    o.source,
    o.u8_output_code,
    o.ven_code,
    o.print_times,
    oi.output_item_id,
    oi.output_id,
    pc.cat_code,
    pc.cat_name,
    pcc.cat_code AS top_cat_code,
    pcc.cat_name AS top_cat_name,
    oi.sku_code,
    sku.model,
    oi.unit,
    oi.batch_code,
    oi.steel_grade,
    oi.spec,
    oi.surface,
    oi.grade,
    oi.quantity,
    oi.unit_price,
    oi.amount,
    oi.note,
    oi.mo_code,
    oi.free1,
    oi.free2,
    oi.free3,
    oi.free4,
    oi.free5,
    oi.free6,
    oi.free7,
    oi.free8,
    oi.free9,
    oi.free10,
    oi.bill_status,
    oi.`status`,
    oi.created_by,
    oi.created_time,
    oi.modified_by,
    oi.modified_time,
    oi.tenant_id,
    oi.row_ver,
    oi.row_no,
    oi.u8_output_item_id,
    oi.producer,
    oi.act_height,
    oi.act_width,
    oi.coating,
    oi.gross_weight,
    oi.py_wh_code,
    oi.wh_pos_code,
    oi.equipment_code,
    oi.project_code,
    oi.r_modified_time,
    oi.note AS item_note,
    CASE
        WHEN (o.receiver IS NULL OR o.receiver = "undefined" OR o.receiver = '') THEN NULL
        ELSE o.receiver
        END AS receiver,
    tenant.tenant_code,
    tenant.tenant_name,
    sku.sku_name,
    sku.sku_desc,
    sku.sku_type,
    ww.wh_code,
    ww.wh_name,
    supp.supplier_name,
    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,
    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,
    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y') AS YEAR
FROM
    ods_mes_wms_wh_output o
        INNER JOIN ods_mes_wms_wh_output_item oi ON o.output_id = oi.output_id AND oi.STATUS = 1
        JOIN ods_mes_pm_sku sku ON oi.sku_code = sku.sku_code AND sku.STATUS = 1
        JOIN dim_ums_tenant tenant ON o.tenant_id = tenant.tenant_id AND tenant.STATUS = 1
        JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww ON ww.wh_code = o.wh_code AND ww.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND ww.STATUS = 1
        JOIN ods_mes_sys_department sd ON o.dept_code = sd.dept_code AND o.tenant_id = sd.tenant_id AND sd.`status` = '1'
        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value av ON o.tenant_id = av.tenant_id AND o.dept_code = av.attribute1 AND av.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_DEPT'
        JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON o.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id AND o.wh_code = av1.attribute1 AND av1.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_WH'
        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value av2 ON o.tenant_id = av2.tenant_id AND oi.sku_code = av2.attribute1 AND av2.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_SCSKU'
        LEFT JOIN ods_mes_sys_supplier supp ON o.ven_code = supp.supplier_code AND supp.`status` = 1
        JOIN ods_mes_pm_cat pc ON sku.cat_id = pc.cat_id AND pc.`status` = '1'
        JOIN ods_mes_pm_cat pcc ON pc.parent_id = pcc.cat_id AND pcc.`status` = '1'
WHERE
    o.STATUS = 1
  AND o.bill_type = '2' ;
